name: Cartoon Rage
short_description: Gather up to 8 friends in this friendship-strengthening game! Solve puzzles, think together, and beat all levels while having a lot of fun! Meet new obstacles and gameplay mechanics as you progress throughout the game until you reach the ultimate puzzles!
detailed_description:
Cartoon Rage is an adventure cooperative game focused on solving 2D platform puzzles with friends! Avoid obstacles and progress to your ship!

  • Multiple gameplay: from 2D platform to other POVs, you have to plan accordingly
  • 5 major sections to complete with up to 8 players!
  • Shared progress: if another player is the host, your own account gets the progress too!
about_the_game:

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, German, Japanese, Russian, Simplified Chinese
